prefixes.name: Pilferer's
prefixes.text: When you gain a Key (7—9)% chance to gain another

prefixes.name: Picklock's
prefixes.text: When you gain a Key (10—12)% chance to gain another

prefixes.name: Thief's
prefixes.text: When you gain a Key (13—16)% chance to gain another

prefixes.name: Cheater's
prefixes.text: (5—8)% chance if you were to lose all your Honour to have 1 Honour instead

prefixes.name: Deceiver's
prefixes.text: (9—12)% chance if you were to lose all your Honour to have 1 Honour instead

prefixes.name: Enhancing
prefixes.text: (3—4)% chance for each of your Keys to upgrade on completing a Floor

prefixes.name: Reforging
prefixes.text: (5—6)% chance for each of your Keys to upgrade on completing a Floor

prefixes.name: Upgrading
prefixes.text: (7—9)% chance for each of your Keys to upgrade on completing a Floor

prefixes.name: Time-warping
prefixes.text: Monsters have 4% reduced Attack, Cast and Movement Speed

prefixes.name: Chronomancy
prefixes.text: Monsters have 5% reduced Attack, Cast and Movement Speed

prefixes.name: Temporal
prefixes.text: Monsters have (6—7)% reduced Attack, Cast and Movement Speed

suffixes.name: of Dignity
suffixes.text: (6—7)% chance to Avoid gaining an Affliction

suffixes.name: of Prestige
suffixes.text: (8—9)% chance to Avoid gaining an Affliction

suffixes.name: of Glory
suffixes.text: (10—11)% chance to Avoid gaining an Affliction

suffixes.name: of Honour
suffixes.text: (12—15)% chance to Avoid gaining an Affliction

suffixes.name: of the Well
suffixes.text: Gain (11—15) Sacred Water when you complete a Room

suffixes.name: of the Fountain
suffixes.text: Gain (16—20) Sacred Water when you complete a Room

suffixes.name: of the Oasis
suffixes.text: Gain (21—30) Sacred Water when you complete a Room

suffixes.name: of Donation
suffixes.text: Restore (25—35) Honour on picking up a Key

suffixes.name: of Offering
suffixes.text: Restore (30—39) Honour on picking up a Key

suffixes.name: of Entrusting
suffixes.text: Restore (40—49) Honour on picking up a Key

suffixes.name: of Bestowing
suffixes.text: Restore (50—59) Honour on picking up a Key

suffixes.name: of Bequeathing
suffixes.text: Restore (60—75) Honour on picking up a Key

suffixes.name: of Excellence
suffixes.text: +(2—3)% to Maximum Honour Resistance

suffixes.name: of Brilliance
suffixes.text: +(4—5)% to Maximum Honour Resistance

suffixes.name: of Progress
suffixes.text: Restore (10—14) Honour on room completion

suffixes.name: of Advancement
suffixes.text: Restore (15—19) Honour on room completion

suffixes.name: of Headway
suffixes.text: Restore (20—24) Honour on room completion

suffixes.name: of Betterment
suffixes.text: Restore (25—30) Honour on room completion

suffixes.name: of Illumination
suffixes.text: (2—3) additional Rooms are revealed on the Trial Map

suffixes.name: of Clairvoyance
suffixes.text: 4 additional Rooms are revealed on the Trial Map
